---
title: "Advanced Bioinformatics 2026 assessment"
author: "m2507596"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cran.rstudio.com/"))
```

```{r}
# Install/load packages (run once)
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

if (!require("DESeq2")) BiocManager::install("DESeq2")
if (!require("pheatmap")) install.packages("pheatmap")
if (!require("ggplot2")) install.packages("ggplot2")

library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap) 
library(ggplot2)
```

## Task 3.1
```{r}
sum(5:55)
```

## Task 3.2
```{r}
sumfun <- function(n) {
  sum(5:n)
}

sumfun(10)
sumfun(20)
sumfun(100)

```

## Task 3.3
```{r}
fib <- numeric(12)
fib[1] <- 1
fib[2] <- 1

for (i in 3:12) {
  fib[i] <- fib[i-1] + fib[i-2]
}

fib
```

## Task 3.4
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = as.factor(gear), y = mpg, fill = as.factor(gear))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Number of gears", y = "Miles per gallon", fill = "Gears") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Task 3.5
```{r}
data(cars)
model_lin <- lm(dist ~ speed, data = cars)
summary(model_lin)
```

## Task 3.6 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(cars, aes(x = speed, y = dist)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "Speed (mph)",
    y = "Distance (ft)",
    title = "Cars: speed vs stopping distance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

## Task 3.7
```{r}
cars$speed2 <- cars$speed^2
model_rt <- lm(dist ~ speed + speed2, data = cars)
summary(model_rt)
```

```{r}
speed_coef <- coef(model_rt)["speed"]
reaction_time <- speed_coef / 1.467
reaction_time
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(cars, aes(x = speed, y = dist)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x + I(x^2), se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  labs(x = "Speed (mph)", y = "Stopping distance (ft)")
```

## Task 3.8
```{r}
setwd("/Users/satveercauleechurn/Downloads/LMS_RNAseq_short-master-2023-final/course/exercises/data")

counts <- read.csv("exercise1_counts.csv", 
                   header = TRUE, 
                   row.names = 1)

sample_description <- read.table("exercise1_sample_description.info", 
                                 header = TRUE, 
                                 row.names = 1)

head(counts)
head(sample_description)

dim(counts)
dim(sample_description)
```

## Task 3.9 

```{r}
coldata <- data.frame(sample_description)
rownames(coldata) <- colnames(counts)
coldata$condition <- as.factor(coldata$condition)
coldata$batch <- as.factor(coldata$batch)

head(coldata)
all(colnames(counts) == rownames(coldata))
dim(counts)
dim(coldata)
```

## Task 3.10

```{r}
library(DESeq2)

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts, 
                              colData = coldata, 
                              design = ~ condition)

dds
```

## Task 3.11
```{r}
rld <- rlog(dds, blind = FALSE)
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)

head(assay(rld), 3)
head(assay(vsd), 3)
```

## Task 3.12
```{r}
library(pheatmap)

top_genes_rlog <- order(rowMeans(assay(rld)), decreasing = TRUE)[1:40]
top_genes_vst <- order(rowMeans(assay(vsd)), decreasing = TRUE)[1:40]

pheatmap(assay(rld)[top_genes_rlog, ], 
         scale = "row", 
         cluster_rows = TRUE, 
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = coldata[, c("condition", "batch")],
         main = "rlog: Top 40 genes")

pheatmap(assay(vsd)[top_genes_vst, ], 
         scale = "row", 
         cluster_rows = TRUE, 
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_col = coldata[, c("condition", "batch")],
         main = "VST: Top 40 genes")
```

## Task 3.13
```{r}
sampleDists <- dist(t(assay(rld)))
sampleDistMatrix <- as.matrix(sampleDists)

library(pheatmap)
pheatmap(sampleDistMatrix,
         clustering_distance_rows = sampleDists,
         clustering_distance_cols = sampleDists,
         col = heat.colors(100),
         annotation_col = coldata[, c("condition", "batch")],
         main = "Sample-to-sample distances (rlog)")
```

## Task 3.14
```{r}
pcaData <- plotPCA(rld, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pcaData, "percentVar"))

cat("PC1:", percentVar[1], "% | PC2:", percentVar[2], "%\n")

plot(pcaData$PC1, pcaData$PC2, col = as.numeric(coldata$condition),
     pch = 19, xlab = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance"),
     ylab = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance"),
     main = "PCA: rlog transformed")
text(pcaData$PC1, pcaData$PC2, labels = rownames(coldata), pos = 3)
legend("topright", legend = levels(coldata$condition), 
       col = 1:length(levels(coldata$condition)), pch = 19)
```

## Task 3.15

```{r}
pcaData_vst <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)
percentVar_vst <- round(100 * attr(pcaData_vst, "percentVar"))

cat("VST - PC1:", percentVar_vst[1], "% | PC2:", percentVar_vst[2], "%\n")

plot(pcaData_vst$PC1, pcaData_vst$PC2, col = as.numeric(coldata$condition),
     pch = 19, xlab = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_vst[1], "% variance"),
     ylab = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_vst[2], "% variance"),
     main = "PCA: VST transformed")
text(pcaData_vst$PC1, pcaData_vst$PC2, labels = rownames(coldata), pos = 3)
legend("topright", legend = levels(coldata$condition), 
       col = 1:length(levels(coldata$condition)), pch = 19)
```
